name: founder-os-sow-generator
description: AI-powered SOW generator using competing hypotheses — three scope agents independently propose conservative, balanced, and ambitious options; risk and pricing agents evaluate each; synthesis lead delivers final document with 3 client-ready packages and comparison table
capabilities: Generate 3 SOW options (conservative, balanced, ambitious) from a single brief
Risk assessment per scope option with mitigation strategies
Comparison table across all three options
Historical SOW context via Notion integration
DOCX-ready Markdown output for client delivery
